title: Golden Glistening Norwegian Sesame Porridge
description: Buttery, fluffy, festive Norwegian dish featuring sesame seeds and confit tomato. A Buddhist temple-friendly breakfast option.
instructions: Rinse the short-grain Japanese rice thoroughly and drain well.
In a medium saucepan, combine the water and dashi powder. Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
In a separate saucepan, melt the unsalted butter over medium heat.
Add the sesame seeds to the melted butter and cook, stirring frequently, until lightly toasted and fragrant.
In a 5-quart donabe pot, combine the cooked rice, confit tomato, and toasted sesame seeds.
Pour the simmering dashi broth over the rice mixture and cook, stirring occasionally, until the liquid has been absorbed and the rice is tender.
Season the porridge with a pinch of salt to taste.
Serve the Golden Glistening Norwegian Sesame Porridge hot, garnished with additional toasted sesame seeds if desired.
